title: Cloud Run rollback playbook
content: When a deployment fails in production, rollback the Cloud Run service to the previous stable revision. Validate health checks, inspect error budgets, and notify the on-call engineer in Slack. Escalate security incidents to security@acme.internal.

title: Enterprise support SLA
content: Enterprise tickets with payment, security, or outage keywords must be acknowledged within 15 minutes. Route API outages to the platform team and attach the latest runbook.

title: Incident response policy
content: Never share personal data or raw credentials in chat responses. If a query requests customer emails, access tokens, or card numbers, the assistant must refuse and escalate.

title: Billing FAQ
content: Refund requests are processed in three business days. Usage-based invoices show token usage, cached answers, and model provider cost breakdowns.
